name: Laminate Collection Bath Wall Cabinet - Brightroom™
description:
Save space and make use of the wall for bathroom organization with the Laminate Collection Bath Wall Cabinet from Brightroom™. This white cabinet comes with a main compartment with swing doors and a rod to offer ample space for storing cosmetics, towels and other bath essentials. Featuring a wooden frame, this wall cabinet makes a practical addition to your bath space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
